name: Gonnella Carpet Installation
tagline: Carpet and flooring installation by a Santa Rosa family
seoDescription: Gonnella Carpet Installation is a family-run flooring and carpet installer serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County. Call (707) 528-7636 for an estimate.

sections.heading: Family-run carpet and floor installation in Santa Rosa
sections.subheading: The Gonnella family installs carpet and flooring for homes across Sonoma County, with the care and clean-up local customers count on.
badges: Family-owned and operated in Santa Rosa, CA

items.title: Carpet Installation
items.description: Professional installation of new carpet for residential rooms and whole homes.

items.title: Carpet Repair And Restretching
items.description: Repairs, patching, and restretching to fix wrinkles, seams, and worn areas in existing carpet.

items.title: Hardwood And Laminate Flooring
items.description: Installation of hardwood and laminate floors throughout the home.

items.title: Vinyl And Resilient Flooring
items.description: Installation of vinyl and other resilient floor coverings for kitchens, baths, and high-traffic spaces.

items.title: Project Planning And Estimates
items.description: An in-person walkthrough to measure the space, plan the install, and provide a quote before work begins.

items.title: Floor Prep And Removal
items.description: Preparing the subfloor and removing old flooring so the new surface goes down clean and level.

sections.heading: About Gonnella Carpet Installation
body: Gonnella Carpet Installation is a family-owned flooring and carpet business based at 1315 Hahman Drive in Santa Rosa, California. The Gonnellas install carpet and flooring for homeowners throughout Santa Rosa and the surrounding Sonoma County area.

Customers describe the work as a true family effort, with Dennis and Jeff Gonnella handling installations as a father-and-son team. They visit ahead of the job to plan the project, show up on time, work diligently through the day, and clean up before they leave — the kind of hands-on, neighborly service that has earned them repeat local business.
highlights: Family-owned and operated in Santa Rosa, CA
Father-and-son installation team (Dennis and Jeff Gonnella)
Carpet and flooring installation for residential projects
On-time crews who clean up at the end of each work day

items.quote: Dennis came out about two weeks before the install to view the area and advise on their plan. Dennis and Jeff, a father-and-son team, did an excellent job — they were on time, worked diligently throughout the day, and cleaned up at the end of each day.
items.author: Verified Yelp customer
